name: Premium Matte Black Gift Box
shortDescription: Elegant matte black rigid gift box with magnetic closure
description:
Our Premium Matte Black Gift Box is crafted with high-quality rigid paperboard, featuring a soft-touch matte lamination and a secure magnetic closure. Perfect for luxury retail packaging, corporate gifting, and special occasions.

Features:
- 1200gsm rigid paperboard
- Soft-touch matte lamination
- Hidden magnetic closure
- Customizable with foil stamping or embossing
- Interior can be lined with velvet or EVA foam

name: Cosmetic Serum Dropper Box
shortDescription: Custom folding carton for serum bottles with UV coating
description:
Specially designed folding carton for cosmetic serum dropper bottles. Features premium 350gsm art paper with spot UV coating to highlight your brand logo.

- Finish: Matte lamination + spot UV
- Size: Customizable to fit your bottle
- Window cutout option available
